reviews.review_description:
I like supporting indie games. This one is an escape room esk type of game. Once you figure it out the game is a one and done. This game may or may not be for you. 

Dev- being it is a one and done, if you add high score board of how fast it takes people to beat it would add replay value.

developer_response.body: Hi Wareix, thanks for being our first review and for supporting indie games! You're completely right, escape room games can suffer from the 'one and done' issue once you know the puzzles. The idea of adding a speedrun/high score board is actually awesome to add replay value. We are definitely taking note of this for future updates. Thanks for the constructive feedback!
